title: SSC CGL Assistant Section Officer
stepsToApply: Step 1: Visit https://ssc.gov.in and complete One-Time Registration (OTR).||Step 2: Login using your Registration Number and Password.||Step 3: Go to Apply tab and select Combined Graduate Level Exam (CGL) 2026.||Step 4: Choose your preferred exam centers (Tier-1).||Step 5: Verify eligibility relaxation based on your category code.||Step 6: Submit application and download final copy.
aiPersonalizedTip: This is a prime match for your profile! Excellent opportunities with massive central government perks and security.
examPattern: Tier 1: 100 Questions, 200 Marks, 60 Minutes. 0.50 negative marking.

recommendedBooks.title: SSC CGL Combined Graduate Level Exam Guide
recommendedBooks.author: R. Gupta's

title: India Post Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS)
stepsToApply: Step 1: Go to indiapostgdsonline.gov.in portal.||Step 2: Create profile using OTR option.||Step 3: Enter Matric 10th Marks (Selection is direct, based on 10th Board merit percentage!).||Step 4: Choose your regional Post circles & options list.||Step 5: Apply preference lists and submit.
aiPersonalizedTip: Zero exams! Selection is made strictly dynamically based on your high school 10th-grade percentage scores.
examPattern: No written exam. Selection is based on merit list derived from 10th standard marks.

title: SSC Combined Graduate Level (CGL) 2026
stepsToApply: Step 1: Go to official ssc.gov.in portal.||Step 2: Log in or complete One-Time Registration (OTR).||Step 3: Access the live application system and capture a mandatory live photograph via webcam/mobile app.||Step 4: Fill in personal and academic details, select post preferences, and choose exam centers.||Step 5: Pay the processing fee online (if applicable) and final-submit the application format.
aiPersonalizedTip: Big Structural Changes! Sectional timings are introduced in Tier-1 (15 minutes per section). Speed and tactical time allocation will decide your qualifying cutoff.
examPattern: Tier 1: 100 Questions, 200 Marks, 60 Minutes (15 mins per section). 0.50 negative marking.

recommendedBooks.author: R.S. Aggarwal

title: UPSC Direct Recruitment (Advt No. 05/2026)
educationRequired: Degree/PG in Engineering, Science, Commerce, Economics or relevant field (Post-wise variation)
stepsToApply: Step 1: Visit the UPSC Online Recruitment Application (ORA) window at upsconline.nic.in/ora.||Step 2: Sign in using your OTR (One Time Registration) credentials.||Step 3: Pick the specific Group A or Group B Gazetted post matching your precise qualification.||Step 4: Upload high-quality digital proofs of your educational credentials and work experience certificates.||Step 5: Process the entry fee and complete your final submission layout.
aiPersonalizedTip: Zero Written Tests! Shortlisting is done based on your academic profile and credentials, directly followed by a heavy-weight interview round for Permanent Gazetted Status.
examPattern: No written exam. Shortlisting based on academic profile and experience, followed by an interview.

title: UPSC Junior Technical Officer & Scientist-B Recruitment
educationRequired: B.E./B.Tech or Master's Degree in Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or Electronics & Communication Engineering
stepsToApply: Step 1: Open the official UPSC ORA portal at upsconline.nic.in.||Step 2: Sign in using your centralized OTR platform profile.||Step 3: Select either Junior Technical Officer or Scientist-B from the active application grid.||Step 4: Map your specific engineering/science engineering academic track credentials to the profile fields.||Step 5: Pay the processing fee online and generate your final PDF application tracking slip.
aiPersonalizedTip: High-tier engineering breakthrough! This bypasses complex standard competitive exams like GATE or Engineering Services Examination (ESE), routing candidates based on core profile strength and targeted conceptual interviews for immediate Level-10 technical ranks.
examPattern: Recruitment Test (RT) if applications are high, followed by an interview. RT is 120 questions, 300 marks, 2 hours.

recommendedBooks.title: UPSC Engineering Services Exam (ESE) General Studies & Engineering Aptitude
recommendedBooks.author: Made Easy Publications

title: RPSC Rajasthan Administrative Services (RAS) 2026
stepsToApply: Step 1: Go to the official rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in or access the state SSO portal.||Step 2: Complete or log in through your One-Time Registration (OTR) link.||Step 3: Select the Rajasthan Administrative Services (RAS) 2026 recruitment notification card.||Step 4: Verify your pre-filled OTR academic profile and upload required domicile certificates if claiming state reservation.||Step 5: Pay the single-time registration fee online and secure your final application acknowledgment code.
aiPersonalizedTip: High-tier administrative gateway! A pristine opportunity to lock in Group A state civil executive profiles (SDM, DSP, Accounts Service) through the updated RPSC three-tier framework.
examPattern: Prelims: 150 Questions, 200 Marks, 3 Hours. Mains: 4 Papers, 800 Marks. Interview: 100 Marks.
syllabus: History, Art, Culture, Literature, Tradition & Heritage of Rajasthan

title: IDBI Bank Executive (Sales & Operations) Recruitment
stepsToApply: Step 1: Navigate to the Careers tab on idbibank.in.||Step 2: Click on the link for 'Recruitment of Executive - Sales and Operations (ESO) 2026-27'.||Step 3: Open the IBPS portal page and click for New Registration.||Step 4: Provide accurate structural info and upload your left thumb impression along with the standard handwritten declaration text.||Step 5: Process the transactional fee via the online banking gateway and download your final system-generated printout.
aiPersonalizedTip: Accelerated Career Path! This operates as a fast-track contract engagement structure that features a definitive internal review pipeline to directly transition into Assistant Manager (Grade A) status upon completing 3 years of benchmark service.
examPattern: Online test: 200 Questions, 200 Marks, 120 Minutes. 0.25 negative marking.

title: SEBI Officer Grade A (Assistant Manager) Recruitment
organization: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
educationRequired: Master's Degree in Economics/Commerce/Stat/BA or Bachelor's Degree in Law/Engineering
stepsToApply: Step 1: Access the Careers portal at the bottom of the official sebi.gov.in homepage.||Step 2: Click on the online application link corresponding to the 2026 Grade A Officer notification.||Step 3: Register on the centralized examination console with your basic email and mobile metrics.||Step 4: Select your targeted stream (General, Legal, Information Technology, or Economics) and input your postgraduate grade indicators.||Step 5: Clear the application fee using an online instrument and archive your digital application proof.
aiPersonalizedTip: Elite financial domain opportunity! Outstanding baseline package for candidates with analytical profiles. Phase 1 and Phase 2 contain heavily weighted specialized papers covering economics, corporate finance, and securities markets laws.
examPattern: Phase I: 2 Papers (100 marks each, 60 mins each). Phase II: 2 Papers (100 marks each, 40/180 mins). Interview.

recommendedBooks.title: SEBI Grade A Officer Exam Guide
recommendedBooks.author: EduGorilla Prep Experts

title: SSC CHSL (10+2)
stepsToApply: Visit the official website ssc.gov.in || Complete the One-Time Registration (OTR) process || Log in and fill out the CHSL 2026 application form || Upload your photograph, signature, and required documents || Pay the application fee online if applicable and submit
aiPersonalizedTip: As a female or SC/ST applicant, you are completely exempted from paying the registration fee! This is an excellent opportunity to apply without any financial barrier.

title: RRB NTPC Station Master
feeDetails: Refer to official notification for category-wise fee details and relaxations
stepsToApply: Go to the official portal indianrailways.gov.in || Select your respective regional RRB portal || Fill out the online application form for Station Master || Upload educational certificates and other required documents || Submit the application and print the confirmation page
aiPersonalizedTip: With a graduate degree, you are fully eligible to apply for this prestigious Station Master role. Make sure to leverage domicile state quota rules which can significantly lower the qualifying cut-off marks.
examPattern: CBT exam covering Math shortcuts, general analytics, and GK.
examBlueprint: Math: 30 Qs / 30 Mks || Reasoning: 30 Qs / 30 Mks || GA: 40 Qs / 40 Mks
